objective: Collect the most valuable set of gems by drafting cards from a shared market.
setup: Shuffle all 60 gem cards and place them face-down as the draw pile.
Reveal 5 cards from the draw pile onto the market board.
The youngest player takes the first player marker.

turnStructure.description: On your turn, take one card from the market, then refill the market from the draw pile.
turnStructure.endCondition: The game ends when the draw pile is empty and all market cards are taken.

coreMechanic.name: Set Collection
coreMechanic.description: Collect sets of matching gem colors. Each complete set of 3 same-color gems scores 5 points. Mixed pairs score 2 points each.

scoring.description: Count your gem sets at game end. Complete sets of 3 matching gems score 5 points. Pairs of different gems score 2 points. Single gems score 0 points.
scoring.winCondition: The player with the most points wins. Ties broken by most complete sets.

edgeCases: If the market is empty and the draw pile is depleted, the game ends immediately.
Wild gem cards count as any color but cannot form a set alone.
